overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a futuristic cyberpunk city (Cyberpunk 2077), following a character walking along a waterfront promenade, through a neon-lit underpass, and across a busy intersection. The environment features towering glass skyscrapers, digital billboards, palm trees, and a mix of open plazas and covered walkways.

woman in gray outfit walking ahead toward the tunnel entrance

entered.detail: calm waterway running parallel to the walkway with futuristic buildings across
massive concrete bridge structure creating a covered passage ahead
tall cylindrical skyscraper with industrial platforms visible in the distance
large illuminated screen visible at the tunnel entrance showing advertisements

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sunny waterfront promenade with a concrete overpass ahead. The camera follows a woman in gray toward a tunnel entrance lined with digital billboards, while other pedestrians walk in the opposite direction along the canal.

agents.ego_description: walking through the neon-lit tunnel following the woman in gray

exposed industrial metal beams and ductwork overhead
large digital billboard displaying advertisements on the left wall
large digital billboard with 'WATSON WHORE' text in white letters

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a covered underpass bathed in vibrant pink neon light. Digital billboards line the walls, including one displaying 'WATSON WHORE' in bold letters. The industrial metal ceiling and glowing walls create a cyberpunk atmosphere as the character walks through.

agents.ego_description: exiting the tunnel and continuing along the sunlit waterfront path

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the pink neon tunnel, the scene opens back to the bright waterfront promenade. Palm trees line the path and wide concrete stairs ascend on the right, while futuristic skyscrapers dominate the skyline across the canal.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront amphitheater with tiered seating and palm trees

agents.ego_description: walking along the waterfront promenade passing people sitting on the tiered stairs

segments.scene_description: The character continues along the waterfront past an amphitheater-like seating area where people relax on the concrete tiers. Palm trees provide shade as the path leads toward a staircase ascending to an upper plaza level.

scene_state.functional_zone: ascending staircase connecting waterfront to upper plaza

reaches top of stairs entering the upper urban plaza

agents.ego_description: climbing the wide concrete stairs alongside other pedestrians moving between levels

segments.scene_description: The character ascends the wide concrete staircase from the waterfront to an upper plaza level. The orange-accented building wall rises on the right while the tiered seating falls away below, revealing the city street level ahead.

events.description: begins crossing the multi-lane street at marked crosswalk with other pedestrians

segments.scene_description: The character crosses a busy city intersection with yellow-striped crosswalks. A red sports car passes by as pedestrians navigate the crossing. Modern glass buildings with storefronts line the street, including one with 'WILD BLUE' signage visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian plaza with hotel entrance

illuminated sign reading 'WILD BLUE HOTEL & SUITES' on the wall

segments.scene_description: The final segment enters a covered plaza with wooden decking and a 'WILD BLUE HOTEL & SUITES' entrance. The space is sheltered from direct sunlight, with potted plants and benches where people sit, creating a transition from the busy street to an indoor commercial environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright waterfront promenade through a neon-lit underpass and finally into a sheltered urban plaza. It begins by following a woman in gray along a sunny canal path toward a concrete overpass, transitioning seamlessly into a covered tunnel bathed in vibrant pink neon light and lined with digital billboards. As the camera emerges from the glow back into the sunlight, the scene opens up to reveal palm trees and futuristic skyscrapers before passing an amphitheater-like seating area. The movement then ascends a wide concrete staircase to an upper plaza, leading the character across a busy city intersection with yellow-striped crosswalks and passing red sports cars. Finally, the shot shifts from the open street into the shaded, wooden-decked entrance of the Wild Blue Hotel & Suites, where potted plants and benches mark the transition to a commercial indoor environment.
